sentences.arabic: أَخْطَأَ مَاجِدٌ فِي تَقْرِيرٍ وَأَخْبَرَ مُدِيرَهُ بِذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: Madžid je pogriješio u izvještaju i obavijestio direktora.
sentences.translationEn: Majid made a mistake in a report and told his manager.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُدِيرُ لَا بَأْسَ وَطَلَبَ مِنْهُ تَصْحِيحَهُ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je rekao nema problema i zatražio da to ispravi.
sentences.translationEn: The manager said no problem and asked him to correct it.

sentences.arabic: أَصْلَحَ مَاجِدٌ الْخَطَأَ وَأَرْسَلَ التَّقْرِيرَ مِنْ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Madžid je ispravio grešku i ponovo poslao izvještaj.
sentences.translationEn: Majid fixed the mistake and sent the report again.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ فِي الْعَمَلِ أَمْرٌ مُهِمٌّ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je da je iskrenost na poslu važna stvar.
sentences.translationEn: He learned that honesty at work is an important thing.
